Companies waste billions on bad ads, mismatched landing pages, and poor budget allocation. Uplane fixes this by replacing a patchwork of agencies, spreadsheets, and siloed tools with one self-improving system. The result: Higher ROAS for enterprises and effortless, expert-level marketing for SMBs.
one_liner: Replace marketing agencies with AI

name: Structured AI
long_description:
Structured AI is building the AI workforce for construction design engineering, starting with AI agents that perform quality control on technical documents and drawings. Our agents learn your standards, apply the right building codes, and automatically review your drawings, so you see fewer clashes, fewer inconsistencies, and fewer costly RFIs and change orders.

⚙️ Automates QA/QC across mechanical, electrical, structural and more
🧩 Used by multi-disciplinary design firms to deliver projects faster with less risk
🚀 Mission: Free engineers to focus on creative design, not repetitive admin
one_liner: AI workforce for Construction Engineering

name: MOVEdot
long_description: Our agents run hardware engineering tasks that normally take hours or days in just a few minutes, allowing engineers to process 100x more data and information. Our platform allows hardware engineers to orchestrate agents for tasks such as analyzing failures across entire test campaigns, pulling the right data and KPIs from their databases, checking how conditions (like temperature or load) affect performance and reliability, and then document findings in reports and dashboards.
one_liner: AI Agents for Hardware Engineering

name: Sylvian
long_description: Sylvian helps companies build specialized AI agents.
one_liner: Specialized AI Agents.

name: Aspect
long_description:
Aspect helps creative teams consolidate 5 media tools into one platform. We provide everything a media team needs: file ingest, local file streaming, review and approval, sharing, and archiving. 

Aspect workspaces come with an agent that has complete understanding of your asset library including comments and revisions. Ask the agent to complete any task in the background: searching for files, setting up folder structures, labeling and organizing footage, and much more.

Check out aspect.inc/use-cases to see how different media teams use Aspect to deliver content faster.
one_liner: Intelligent media storage for creative teams.

name: Locus
long_description:
We make your agents pay.

As agents evolve from tools into dependable, autonomous actors, they’ll need the ability to execute open-ended workflows end-to-end.

This inevitably means payments: accessing paywalled data, transacting for services or with other specialist agents. But autonomy requires guardrails. Businesses and developers will need a way to ensure their agents only spend how much and on what they’re supposed to.

The machine economy is coming, and Locus (YC F25) is building the connector businesses will need to participate. We connect agents securely to funds, letting you define permissions and limits for every transaction. Each payment is traceable, auditable, and fully reconcilable with your existing financial stack.
one_liner: Payment infrastructure for AI agents

name: Sorce
long_description: Tinder for Jobs. Swipe right, AI applies on your behalf.
one_liner: Tinder for jobs

name: Veria Labs
long_description:
Veria Labs is developing AI agents that hack better than the best human hackers. Founded by members of the #1 US competitive hacking team, we've already found critical bugs in AI tools, operating systems, fintech and billion dollar crypto exchanges. 

Now we're scaling that expertise through AI-native security tooling that operates faster than human researchers while finding deeper, more complex vulnerabilities that traditional tools miss.
one_liner: Continuous AI pentesting that finds and fixes vulnerabilities

name: Trelium
one_liner: The Agent to Build Your Agents

name: Semble AI
long_description:
Semble builds custom AI agents trained on how your business actually runs and plugged into the tools your team already lives in.

Jonathan and Ethan met studying computer science at Stanford. Jonathan worked at Convergint, one of the world's largest building system integrators, specifically for the purpose of learning how this industry works.

They are determined to make Semble the industry standard for construction's back-office.
one_liner: AI workflow automation for construction back-office

name: Mod AI
long_description:
We're building the first fully autonomous accounts payable platform.

Our AI clerks handle your entire AP workflow: invoice processing, GL coding, PO matching, approvals, responding to vendors, fraud detection and reporting. From the moment an invoice hits your inbox to the moment it's paid, no manual steps required.

We integrate with 16+ ERPs including QuickBooks, NetSuite, SAP, Dynamics 365, and Workday.

Find out why enterprise teams choose Mod AI at usemod.ai.
one_liner: Touchless AP Automation

name: Terrain
long_description: Terrain is an AI native go-to-market platform for teams selling to the physical economy - contractors, restaurants, etc.
one_liner: AI native GTM platform for the physical economy

name: LogosGuard
long_description: Enterprises are racing to adopt AI, but often don't have the right controls in place or know how to verify vendors are compliant. LogosGuard turns AI policies into executable controls, stress-tests your AI products, and continuously monitors changes, giving enterprises the confidence to scale AI responsibly.
one_liner: The risk management software for enterprises adopting AI

name: Logical
long_description: Logical is a desktop AI that acts as a proactive and largely promptless copilot, designed to reduce the friction of using AI for everyday tasks. It transfers context across apps, and allows taking action on many apps with just a few clicks. Logical can assist with drafting emails, writing docs, noting meetings and can even automatically detect action items. Need to prompt? Logical can understand intent in much fewer words than a regular chatbot. Plus, user data is never sent to Logical servers. Logical is the AI resurrection of Clippy, but actually good.
one_liner: A proactive desktop copilot. Clippy, but actually good.

name: ComplyDo
long_description:
The most flexible enterprise compliance engine that makes GRC teams 10x more efficient. Already trusted by global leaders and the largest EU enterprises.

What it does:
- Extracts requirements from any file
- Maps them to controls and policies
- Shows gaps and monitors changes
- Advises on maturity and next steps
one_liner: Global Compliance for Enterprises

name: Codyco
long_description:
€5,000 in additional bookings. In 4 weeks. For a 53-room hotel.

We help hotel groups turn missed calls into bookings.

This it how it works: 

- They send their missed calls to us.
- Our AI answers and takes the booking.
- The booking goes right into their PMS.

Even with call centers and central reservation departments they are still losing 5% of calls. 

That is a seven figure revenue leak. 

Why us? 
We used to build software that can’t fail for massive companies. We started Codyco after a friend told us how much money he was losing from missed calls. We built the first version just for him.

Now we give hotel groups the reliable AI they need, so they never lose a booking on the phone again.
one_liner: The AI Reservation Team for Hotel Groups

name: Compyle
long_description:
Compyle is a less autonomous coding agent that asks before it acts. We're like Cursor or Claude Code - but you won't need to rewrite your codebase every time you use it for more than a small task.

We built Compyle because we were frustrated with the direction other coding agents are headed. They're all racing to be more autonomous, running for hours without human input.

This doesn't work for real production code. When agents run autonomously, they make countless small decisions that pile up in your codebase. Engineers lose ownership - they don't know what was implemented, can't effectively debug or maintain it, and struggle to build on top of it. The code becomes a black box, and they're forced to throw it away.

Compyle keeps engineers in the driver's seat.
one_liner: The coding agent that actually collaborates with you

name: Thesis
long_description: We are automating AI research and development. Our aim is to help AI researchers uncover the next AlphaFold or build the next Transformer, faster, more systematically, and at scale. We treat discovery not as a matter of luck, but as a combinatorial search problem. Every major breakthrough in AI over the next decade will be made by Thesis.
one_liner: Autonomous AI research

name: Pixley AI
long_description:
Pixley is the first platform where kids can turn their drawings and ideas into fully animated cartoons in minutes. In just 3 weeks after launch, over 1000 families across 75 countries have already started creating stories.

We’re starting with a clear wedge: personalized kids’ entertainment. Parents are tired of overstimulating, low-value content from YouTube and Netflix. Pixley gives them safe and personalized stories that encourage learning and imagination.

But kids’ cartoons are just the beginning. As video generation improves, all video content will shift from manual production to being personalized and generated. Our long-term goal is to build the AI Netflix: a platform where shows and movies aren’t recommended, but instead generated around each viewer’s interests and habits.

We’re 19 year old CS dropouts who’ve known each other since elementary school and won 4 hackathons at 15. After seeing AI flood the internet with low-quality content, we created Pixley – a safe, personalized way for kids to turn their ideas into animated stories.
one_liner: The first platform where parents & kids can co-create AI cartoon shows

name: Leadbay
long_description:
Leadbay qualifies millions of Data-Signal-Scarce leads that couldn't be found before.

Teams at L'Oréal, Saint-Gobain, Gerflor USA, Corgi, and Nespresso B2B have 3x'd their addressable market and 10x'd what they defined as "qualified leads". Talking to our customers, we used to hear, "10 minutes on Leadbay beats 6 months with Clay and a GTM agency."

Co-founders are Milan Stankovic (CTO) - PhD to make AI work with limited data, and Ludovic Granger (CEO). 

Create an account.
A new market is yours.
leadbay.ai.
one_liner: Qualify millions of Data-Signal-Scarce leads that couldn't be found…

name: Imagine AI
long_description:
Imagine AI is a research and software company reverse engineering modern B2B growth, starting with LinkedIn.

We build coordinated content systems for executive teams, where the CEO, VP of Sales, and Head of Marketing post aligned narratives from a single calendar, producing compounding reach that single-founder posting cannot reach.

50+ B2B companies are now using Imagine AI, including MongoDB, Rippling, Slash, and Corgi Insurance. Customers have generated $31M in attributed revenue, 12M impressions, and 1,400 hours of executive time saved.
one_liner: We reverse engineer B2B growth, starting with LinkedIn.

name: Prism
long_description: Prism is an AI-native recruiting agency. We use software and agents to find companies better people faster.
one_liner: AI-native recruiting agency

name: Sourcebot
long_description:
Sourcebot is an open source code understanding platform for massive codebases. We’re used by thousands of engineers in some of the largest companies in the world, including NVIDIA, Red Hat, Wikimedia, and Arista Networks.

Understanding code, not writing it, is the primary bottleneck for large engineering teams. For developers, this means onboarding onto complex codebases faster. For AI agents, it means getting the necessary code context to minimize hallucinations and maximize cohesion within the wider codebase.

Sourcebot solves this by giving developers and AI agents the ability to regex search across millions of lines of code instantly, as well as ask questions across thousands of repos using any flagship reasoning model. Being open source and on-prem, we can get deployed in enterprises within minutes before other tools even get approval.

We met a decade ago at McGill University and have been building together full time for over 2 years. We’ve personally felt the pain of understanding large codebases while working at Microsoft, EA, Ubisoft, Google, and Meta.
one_liner: Helping humans and AI agents understand massive codebases

name: Philon
long_description: Building open-source general-purpose robots capable of performing unsafe, repetitive or boring tasks.
one_liner: General Purpose Robots

name: Narrative
long_description: Narrative automates the creation and distribution of high-quality sports highlight videos for broadcasters, teams, and leagues.
one_liner: AI-Powered Sports Highlights

name: Specific
long_description: Specific lets your coding agent write code and build the infrastructure to deploy it. Connect your favorite coding agent and start building immediately. Run `specific dev` to get a full local environment running in seconds. Run `specific deploy` to go to production on our scalable cloud platform in minutes.
one_liner: AWS for coding agents

name: Arcten
one_liner: Lab working on long-horizon autonomous research and coding agents

name: Denki
long_description:
Automate internal auditing (planning, testing, documenting) to comply better with financial regulations.

Denki performs audit work with 99% software, 1% services:

✔️ Works on existing systems (e.g. Auditboard, Workiva, ERPs)
✔️ Automates Control processes (e.g. collects evidence, runs walkthrough interviews, tests)
✔️ Records every step for traceability (workpapers w/ full audit trace)

Focused on SOX programs and financial regulations (SEC Rules etc.)
one_liner: The full-stack AI financial audit firm

name: Lemma
long_description: Lemma catches the silent, semantic failures your observability tools miss, where your AI agent looks like it worked but didn’t. We scan every trace to surface issues before users complain, identify root causes, and help you fix them without manual digging, so your agents improve over time.
one_liner: Reliability platform for AI agents

name: Freeport Markets
long_description: Freeport is a trading platform for pre-IPO shares, equities, crypto, and perpetual futures. Our AI analysts turn trusted social and financial media into a real-time feed of market-moving news and actionable trade ideas.
one_liner: Trade like a hedge fund.

name: Boom AI
long_description:
Boom reaches out to your customers before you lose them.

We run proactive outbound conversations at scale: recovering churned users, re-engaging drop-offs, and protecting revenue you thought was gone. AI agents hold real conversations with your customers over SMS, email, WhatsApp, or phone, in their language, on the channel they actually answer.

Every month, companies lose 5-15% of revenue to churn, and more walks out through abandoned signups and failed onboarding. The tools built to fix this don't work. Win-back emails get ignored. Cancel flows only catch people at the door. Hiring humans doesn't scale. Boom does the one thing that works: a real conversation. 1,000x the reach of manual outreach, and the customer can reply.
one_liner: AI agents that recover lost revenue through real conversations.

name: Nerviom
long_description:
Infrastructure projects like data centers, factories, and energy facilities require navigating hundreds of permits and regulatory approvals before construction can begin. 

Today this process is handled through consultants, spreadsheets, and thousands of pages of documentation, adding years to project timelines and millions in consulting costs.

We are building an AI autopilot to automate infrastructure permitting and regulatory compliance. 

Our goal is to significantly reduce the time and cost required to get infrastructure projects approved and built.
one_liner: AI Autopilot for Infrastructure Permitting

name: LunaBill
long_description:
LunaBill is building AI Voice callers for healthcare billing teams. Insurance claim follow-up calls account for the 80% of the daily workload of a healthcare billing team, with each call averaging 30 minutes.

Since our launch in July we are now at $764K in contracted ARR, of which $428K is live revenue and the rest will go live by January 2026. Our customers see a 10x increase in claims followed up per biller in the first week and we have converted 100% of pilots to paying customers. We have automated 50,000+ calls and signed partnerships with top healthcare leaders like UC health systems, Mayo, Experian Health and more.

The founders have known each other for over a year. Suhail is a 2x founder, with 3+ years of experience building in healthcare including operating a medical billing company with 200+ healthcare clients. David founded Skiesoft, Taiwan’s biggest healthcare AI scribe company, used by 120k+ healthcare professionals. He also worked as a data scientist at UCSF, building models to audit medical-coding accuracy. Yash was a researcher at various hospital systems including Mayo Clinic.
one_liner: AI Voice callers for healthcare billing teams

name: Antigen
long_description:
Antigen is an AI adversary for the enterprise. It maps, exploits, and secures your attack surface through nightly automated offensive testing and monthly human red team assessments. Every finding is delivered with traces, reproduction steps, and remediation directly in GitHub, Linear, or the Antigen Platform.

We work with companies in financial services, healthcare, retail, and government where security is trust.

We're backed by Lightspeed, DST Global, and Susa Ventures.
one_liner: Continuous offensive security for the enterprise.

name: Fastshot
long_description:
Fastshot is a no-code mobile development platform.
Our mission is to "Democratize mobile app creation with AI"
Anyone can develop a mobile app from idea to App Stores within minutes just by chatting with AI.
one_liner: Lovable for mobile apps

name: Clicks
long_description: Clicks is the AI-native BPO backed by Y Combinator. We replace traditional BPOs and shared service centers by automating back-office work with AI agents that operate your existing tools and follow your existing processes. We achieve higher accuracy and faster turn-around times at a fraction of the cost, with SOC 2 Type 2 and HIPAA compliance built in.
one_liner: AI agents for your back-office operations.

name: MarkIt
long_description:
MarkIt builds AI agents that work directly inside the workflows trade professionals use every day — Excel, PDFs, broker portals, and more. 
From defensible classification, ACE report audits, and a self-updating system of record, it serves trade professionals end to end with agents intelligent enough to work in the complex environment. 

MarkIt brings reasoning, memory, and automation to global trade compliance, helping Suppliers, Brokers, and OEMs reduce errors, save time, and streamline operations in the growingly intense world of Global Trade.
one_liner: AI Agents for Trade Compliance - Saving Companies from Tariffs

name: Zarna
long_description:
Zarna is private equity’s first AI associate class.

Our agents plug directly into your firm’s data and work like a deal team that never sleeps. Zarna’s agents analyze CIMs, build LBOs, update CRMs, draft IC memos, & act based on decades of proprietary firm knowledge. 

The result: investors spend less time buried in decks and spreadsheets, and more time on judgment, relationships, and winning deals.
one_liner: AI Associates for Private Capital

name: Rivet
long_description:
Rivet is a visual AI editor for product designers to make UI changes.  Designers ship the changes they make directly to their codebase. 

The most painful problem for designers today is that their vision doesn't match code.  Rivet replaces slow collaboration between designers and engineers by letting designers just do it themselves. Rivet's editor helps turn product designers into design engineers.
 
Design-led companies in YC are Rivet customers.

Learn more at rivet.design
one_liner: Visual editor to design in production code

name: ClaimGlide
long_description: We automate the entire end-to-end prior-authorization process for private practices for cheaper, and more accurately than they're doing today.
one_liner: AI automated prior-auths for private medical practices

name: Haladir
long_description: Haladir is the decisional AI layer for logistics. We sit on top of your WMS, TMS, OMS, etc., unify their data into one operational graph, and embed solver-grade optimization, ML models, and process intelligence into the decisions that power supply chains. Today's AI brought intelligence. The next frontier is judgement.
one_liner: Operational Superintelligence for Global Logistics

name: Imperfect
long_description: The Imperfect app pulls your data to create a personalized AI coach for your next race. It adapts your training, recovery, and nutrition to how your body is actually responding.
one_liner: AI coach for athletes with real lives and epic goals

name: 10x Science
long_description:
10x Science develops frontier AI models with deep memory to redefine how scientists understand and engineer biology across the life sciences, starting with drug development.

AI-powered drug discovery is flooding the pipeline with new candidates faster than ever. But before any of them can advance to the clinic, scientists must deeply characterize the protein therapeutic to understand whether it will work. Today, that process takes months of manual, error-prone analysis that cannot keep pace with discovery. Our AI-native platform automates it, giving drug developers the confidence to advance the right candidates and stop the wrong ones early.

We have strong commercial traction with enterprise pharma customers. Our founding team built the field of next-generation protein characterization out of Carolyn Bertozzi's Nobel laureate lab at Stanford. Collectively, we have 18+ years of collective domain expertise, 47+ scientific publications, and a 2x YC Founder. We move at the highest velocity and are positioned to lead the next generation of modern AI development in the life sciences.
one_liner: The AI-native platform for next-generation protein characterization.

name: Salus
long_description:
Your agent processed a refund without looking up the order ID, costing you thousands. You only found out three hours later from a support ticket. Evals, output scoring, and observability can reduce the likelihood of mistakes like these occurring - but there's no solution that inspects and prevents an action as it’s about to execute. Salus does that.

We’ve built an API that wraps around your agent and checks its actions at run time, blocking incorrect ones and providing immediate feedback to guide retries. Kevin and Vedant were roommates at Stanford, where they both studied computer science.
one_liner: Guardrails to validate your agent's actions before they execute

name: Q2Q
long_description:
Q2Q is the AI-native outbound engine for deal sourcing. Tell us the types of companies you want to buy, and we'll get qualified meetings booked for you. 

You can think of Q2Q as your personal team of AI interns. You give us your buying criteria, and we'll go out and find companies, write personalized emails, and get first calls booked with business owners for you. As the human in the loop, you'll approve messages before we send. Q2Q handles the sourcing work so you can focus on evaluating great deals.
one_liner: We help private equity teams find acquisition targets faster

name: Traverse
one_liner: Research lab solving non-verifiable work

name: Approxima
long_description: Human-assisted development should be for novel ideation, not routine maintenance, bug fixes or incremental updates. Approxima is bringing you that future with agents that can scope work, code, validate their fixes end-to-end in sandbox environments and merge to production. Book a demo: https://calendly.com/ashish-selvaraj/approxima
one_liner: Your software should build itself.

name: InventoryQuant
long_description: We automate inventory and contents processing for insurance and insurance-adjacent industries, including public adjusters, restoration contents, and insurance companies. We also handle various inventory and estimate adjacent processes that cost many billions of dollars a year and thousands of years of man hours.
one_liner: We automate the inventory process in insurance

name: Bubble Lab
long_description:
Bubble Lab turns natural language into visual, production-ready workflows — built for modern ops teams, with built-in observability, logs, and execution traces.

Deploy to Slack in one click so your team can build and run workflows from anywhere.
one_liner: Prompt once, automate forever.

name: Archal
long_description: Archal lets you test agents and code that touch third-party APIs without hitting the real services. We build working clones of popular SaaS platforms that hold state across requests and behave like the originals, so you catch bugs before your agent does something irreversible in production.
one_liner: The eval platform for autonomous software

name: Datoric
one_liner: Responsibly sourced data for multimodal AI

name: Carrot Labs
long_description:
The problem: 
AI spend is scattered across multiple provider billing consoles that don't talk to each other. Teams can't answer simple questions like "which customer is driving our Anthropic bill?" or "is this feature profitable after AI costs?" without manually pulling data from each provider and stitching it together in a spreadsheet.

What SuperPenguin does: 
SuperPenguin tracks AI spend across 14 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Deepgram, ElevenLabs, Modal, Cursor and more).

Zero-code setup: connect an API key and costs sync automatically with model-level breakdowns, trends, and forecasts.
Per-request attribution: add two lines of Python SDK to tag every AI call by customer, feature, or team.
Slack alerts on budget thresholds and spend anomalies.

Most teams are set up in under five minutes. We help companies see where their AI money goes and whether it's worth it.
one_liner: AI Cost Management: Track and attribute AI spend across every provider

name: Hedge
long_description: Hedge is an AI-Native specialty insurance company. We help insurance brokers find faster, cheaper, and better coverage for their customers.
one_liner: AI-Native specialty insurance company

name: primitive
long_description: Building the communication infrastructure needed for fully autonomous agents
one_liner: Communication for agents

name: Standard Signal
long_description: Standard Signal is the first hedge fund that researches and executes trades purely with AI. Our custom models discover and trade on new fundamental truths about the world before humans can.
one_liner: Hedge fund where AI researches and executes every trade

name: PerfectBit
long_description: We create a new kind of data for training AI models. Most LLMs are pre-trained on noisy web-scraped text, but they hallucinate and still fail on tasks that humans find trivial.  PerfectBit creates high-quality training data that's correct by construction. We verify against physics simulators, scientific databases, formal proof systems. LLMs, robotics, AI for Science, and more.
one_liner: Training data for frontier AI labs

name: WithAI
long_description:
WithAI helps institutional investors research stocks and manage their portfolios. We're live with four hedge funds, and our users spend 5+ hours a day in the platform.

Investors who try "nearly every tool on the market," to quote a client of ours, "wind up with an unwieldy collection of fragmented point solutions." Those who focus on building a great setup with general agents are instead "signing up for a full-time job." So we deploy a platform called Multiplier that unifies structured data, unstructured data, AI work, human work, and tacit firm knowledge in one secure, governed, customized application.

Our first vertical: independent equity funds with $250M-$5B of assets. They know AI is essential for staying relevant, but they don't have the time or talent to figure out what to do about it. But once we deploy Multiplier––"We used to spend 80% of our time gathering information and 20% of our time acting on it," said one customer. "WithAI has flipped those percentages."
one_liner: Agent harnesses for asset managers

name: Lightsprint
long_description:
Lightsprint is a collaborative platform for software teams to plan visually, preview live and ship with an army of cloud agents. Your whole team, including non-engineers, can now ship end to end reliably.

The company is founded by Ben Ong, an AI investor who previously scaled AI products at SEA Group (NYSE: SE) and Temasek ($300B fund), Benedict Chan who was VP Engineering at Chainlink and CTO at BitGo (NYSE:BTGO), and Heng Hong Lee who built Facebook Messenger in 2013 and was Director of Engineering at Fazz (YC S17).
one_liner: Collaborative product development platform

name: Incandor
long_description: Incandor detects fraud on banking and fintech platforms by learning how every user physically behaves — mouse dynamics, keystroke timing, scroll patterns, and on mobile, how they hold their phone. Founded by two Stanford engineers and backed by Y Combinator, Incandor builds a behavioral map of every user on your platform — no fraud labels or historical data required. At the individual level, it identifies account takeovers with >99% accuracy. At the population level, coordinated rings, mule operators, and coerced sessions separate out naturally. Rather than a black-box risk score, fraud teams query the map via a programmable API.
one_liner: Behavioral intelligence infrastructure for anti-fraud

name: InLoop Robotics
long_description:
We are building AI-native fulfillment powered by robotics.
Warehouses without human labor that get better, faster, and cheaper with every order.

Most robotics companies wait until their system is perfect before deploying. We don't. We ship imperfect policies into real warehouses, detect failures in real time, recover automatically when we can, and bring in a remote human operator when we can't.

Every failure becomes training data. Every intervention makes the system better. The result is a fulfillment system that continuously learns from production.
one_liner: Staff your warehouse with robotic employees today

name: Atrisa (formerly Refortifai)
long_description: AI Agents to build, debug and automate analog circuit design
one_liner: AI Agents for Analog Circuit Design

name: Hub.xyz
long_description: Hub.xyz provides real-world training data to frontier AI labs
one_liner: The API for real-world training data.

name: GodHands
long_description:
GodHands is a deterministic computer use layer that enables AI agents to reliably operate across browser and desktop apps. 

We make real-world workflows even on legacy or non-API systems more deterministic and predictable, without completely relying on fragile vision-based approaches. By leveraging our infrastructure, your agent can seamlessly operate across new or internal enterprise applications without requiring custom integrations or per-app handling.
one_liner: Deterministic Computer Use Infra for AI Agents

name: Superlog
long_description:
Sentry and Datadog dump a stream of alerts. Most are duplicates, most lack context, and you still have to solve the issue yourself.

Superlog is AI-native observability that's meant not to be opened. A wizard scans your repo and installs proper OpenTelemetry instrumentation, then runs daily to keep up as you ship new code. When something breaks, Superlog groups the errors into a single incident, investigates with full context (logs, traces, recent deploys, past Slack threads), and posts one mergeable PR in Slack. You merge it, ignore it, or open it as a Claude Code session and modify it.

Telemetry is vendor-neutral, so you keep every log, trace, and metric we install, even if you leave.
one_liner: Observability that installs itself and fixes the bugs it finds.

name: HEVN, inc
long_description: HEVN is a B2B banking platform for global payments, built on stablecoin rails and a new API for virtual bank accounts under DASP regulation. Companies use HEVN for global payroll and payment automation, with 70% of transaction volume processed through our API. We are up to 30% cheaper than Wise, while transfers are sent from bank accounts in the company's name and transaction limits of up to $1M per transfer.
one_liner: b2b banking for global payments

name: qomplement
long_description:
qomplement is the agentic ERP for retail and logistics companies.

Retail and logistics are the industries with the highest volume of transactions in the world. POs, freight invoices, inventory updates, and shipment confirmations. Every single one still requires a person to process it manually. Their only solution has been hiring more people.

Legacy ERPs were built for humans. qomplement is the agentic ERP that cuts 95% of manual work and handles 100x more transactions with the same headcount. We give procurement and operations teams superpowers: automating purchase order intake, vendor onboarding, item master updates, freight order processing, carrier invoicing, three-way matching, and inventory reconciliation.

Already trusted by some of the largest grocery chains and trucking companies in the world. Headquartered in San Francisco.
one_liner: The Agentic ERP for supply chain operations

name: Pavoot
long_description:
Pavoot is an AI event manager for companies that run in person customer events.

More and more companies are investing in dinners, summits, and community events because relationships drive revenue. But today, running events means sourcing attendees, sending invites, hosting the event, and then manually digging through notes, emails, and spreadsheets afterward to figure out who attended, what was discussed, who is a strong lead, and who should be followed up with. Most teams either send generic "thanks for coming" emails or never properly capture the value created during the event.

Pavoot replaces this fragmented workflow with one AI system that keeps every attendee, interaction, conversation, and follow up connected in one place, making relationship driven growth scalable.

Gohar and Ana met while studying Computer Science at ETH Zürich. Gohar was part of Switzerland’s national chess team at the age of 16 and is a 6x Swiss chess champion. Ana won more than 20 medals in Scientific Olympiads and built internal AI systems used by hundreds of data scientists at some of the largest banks in Latin America.

===

Book a demo: pavoot.com
one_liner: AI Event Manager for Customer Events

name: shotwell.ai
long_description: Shotwell provides dense annotations and quality checks for robotics training data. Data quality is the biggest lever in improving robot model performance, and we have developed models that can automatically produce these annotations and operate at a fraction of the cost and instant turnaround time.
one_liner: Automated Scale AI for robotics data

name: Sherpa
long_description: Sherpa automatically increases website conversion rates by analyzing visitor behavior, building new page variants, and continuously A/B testing them. Customers typically see a 15-20% lift on their primary conversion metric in their first 30 days.
one_liner: Turn more website visitors into customers

name: Callab AI
long_description:
58% of the $400B call center industry runs on on-prem phone systems, and until now bringing AI voice automation to them meant ripping out their entire infrastructure first. That's the largest unserved segment in the market. Callab AI connects directly to legacy PBX systems like Avaya, Cisco UCM, and Mitel, and automates up to 70% of call volume with zero migration needed.

We plug into these environments without requiring a rip-and-replace. We serve clients across three continents, including brands like Dunkin Donuts.
one_liner: AI voice agents for on-prem telephony stack.

name: StableBrowse
long_description: We are making the browser layer for your AI agents. Agents don’t need to see UIs like us humans do. We give agents a semantic understanding of the web instead of brittle visual interfaces. Your agents can perform deep research, large-scale scraping, and complex automation—more efficiently with our knowledge graphs that turns the web into a native protocol for LLMs.
one_liner: Browser Layer for AI agents

name: Lab0
long_description:
Enterprise software implementation is broken,  and it has been for decades. 
Every rollout, whether it's a traditional ERP or a new AI system, requires months of manual integration, configuration, and tuning done by armies of system integrators and forward-deployed engineers. 
Lab0 builds agentic systems that automate this layer, compressing months-long implementations into weeks.
one_liner: Automated forward-deployed engineers (AI FDEs)

name: Gojiberry AI
long_description:
Gojiberry is building the AI GTM team for B2B companies.

We start with outbound: Gojiberry finds buyers showing intent, enriches them, reaches out, follows up, handles replies, and books qualified meetings.

Companies use Gojiberry to replace the old way of doing outbound: buying tools, hiring SDRs & agencies, testing lists, writing messages, and guessing what works. Gojiberry turns it into one AI team that finds buyers and books meetings.

Every campaign makes Gojiberry smarter. It learns which buyers convert, which signals matter, which messages get replies, and which actions create revenue. Over time, Gojiberry uses what works across similar companies and industries to help every new customer get better results from day one.

Long term, Gojiberry will become the system that finds every revenue opportunity and acts on it: outbound leads, website visitors, inbound leads, old CRM leads, replies, meetings, CRM updates, new campaign ideas, and account expansion.

The goal is to make every B2B company able to run a high-performing GTM team without hiring one.

We grew from $0 to $2.5M ARR in 10 months, are growing 30% MoM, profitable, and used by 2,000+ customers.

Customers get 2-5x more positive replies than traditional outbound.
one_liner: AI GTM agents for B2B teams

name: Napkin Math
long_description:
Existing consumer health apps focus on scaling a one-size-fits-all solution: calorie deficits. But they don’t answer the questions you actually have.

Food is deeply personal, and so is Napkin Math:

Get the fuel you need for marathon training, while understanding you eat catered office lunches five days a week. Discover what’s triggering your stomach irritation, without sacrificing your weekly dinner with friends. Napkin Math tailors a plan for not only your specific health goal, but also your life.
one_liner: The personalized AI food journal that people love to use.

name: Ontora
long_description: Ontora is an AI Agent that interviews every employee to map how work actually gets done and identify bottlenecks. Consultants spend months doing this manually; Ontora does it in hours.
one_liner: AI agents that interview every employee to map how work gets done.

name: Voquill
long_description:
Voquill is the modern AI-native operating system for medical labs. This software manages the entire workflow of the lab (accessioning, workflow, reporting, coding, compliance, and revenue) and contains modern agentic AI tools to help each step. For example, pathologists can write reports 20% faster through our voice AI coworker.

Incumbent lab operating systems are old, don't scale with how modern labs work, and can’t integrate existing AI solutions. As a result, labs are either building their own or paying millions for band-aid solutions and consultants. We're building an agentic platform to manage every aspect of the lab and displace the billions spent on legacy management systems.
one_liner: The modern AI-native operating system for medical labs.

name: Prototyping.io
long_description: Prototyping.io turns CAD designs into real mechanical parts through an AI-driven manufacturing system. We analyze designs for manufacturability and automate production workflows to deliver high-quality parts faster and at lower cost.
one_liner: Autonomous manufacturing for mechanical parts

name: Mount
long_description:
TLDR: Mount is building the AI insurance carrier, starting with liability coverage for deployed AI agents. As everyone moves AI Agents into production and gives them more responsibility, we help businesses insure and secure them.

Whenever responsibility shifts from human operators to autonomous systems, so too does the liability that accompanies it. The systems also introduce new risks: agentic software failures, prompt injection attacks, autonomous workflow errors, data leaks, and more.

Legacy insurance was not built for this. Existing policies are often silent, ambiguous, or exclude autonomous software, and traditional insurers lack the data and technical capability to assess deployed AI Systems.

Our first product, the Mount AI Liability Policy, is built for mid-market and enterprise companies deploying autonomous AI agents in real business processes. We scan and red-team AI deployments, quantify operational risk, help fix vulnerabilities, and insure the residual risk with purpose-built AI liability coverage.

Mount is best thought of as a highly automated version of today's commercial insurance carriers, which run on manual workflows, layers of intermediaries, and tens of thousands of employees. AI enables automation of underwriting, pricing, policy issuance, claims, fraud detection, customer support, and distribution. We believe that the best way to use this opportunity is to rebuild those processes from the ground up.
one_liner: The AI Insurance Carrier

name: Archer
long_description:
Archer is the company money brain. We let agents move your money for you in your business.

We help companies deploy AI agents that can spend, purchase, reward, and move money on behalf of their business. Instead of relying on employees to manually execute every financial action, businesses can give agents budgets, permissions, and goals, allowing them to take action automatically when important events occur.

Our flagship feature is agentic commerce. Businesses use Archer to deploy AI agents that can purchase goods and services in the real world on behalf of their company. Today, companies are using Archer to automatically send personalized physical rewards when important business events occur. A customer completes onboarding. A partner generates a referral. An employee hits a milestone. An agent understands the context, purchases the reward, and handles execution automatically.

We believe physical rewards are just the beginning. The same infrastructure that allows agents to purchase and send rewards today will allow them to route revenue, incentivize employees, run referral programs, and execute financial actions across every part of a business. As agents gain context from CRMs, product data, Slack, Linear, Notion, internal systems, and APIs, they become increasingly capable of understanding what is happening across a company and taking action automatically.

For hundreds of years, businesses have used software to manage information and store money. We believe the next generation of businesses will rely on AI agents to make decisions and take financial action on their behalf to materially benefit their business.
one_liner: The company money brain. Let agents move your money.

name: Degla Inc
long_description: We turn natural Language into Multi-Drone Search & Rescue Mission execution. Degla is built around a simple idea: once you’ve expressed your intent, the system owns the problem.You don’t babysit drones. You don’t micromanage failures. You don’t rewrite plans. You state the goal, Degla figures out how.
one_liner: The fully autonomous intelligence layer in the sky.

name: Ara
long_description: Ara is the self-driving IDE for software teams. It watches work in progress, suggests the next step, and executes tasks through non-invasive computer use, background agents, memory, and reusable skills. Ara turns coding into a closed loop: suggest, act, learn, improve.
one_liner: Ara is the self-driving IDE for software teams.

name: Zibra Labs
former_names: TBD. We don't have a name yet.
long_description:
We build distributed compute clusters with the cheapest CPUs and GPUs across Hyperscalers and Neoclouds for AI. Our mission is to bring frontier-grade infrastructure to everyone.

We're starting by building large scale high performance computing (HPC) clusters for quantitative trading firms to run parallel simulation workloads such as backtesting. 

Our technology generalizes to critical AI workloads such as post-training with reinforcement learning, fine-tuning, long-horizon agents with high tool use, and batch inference.
one_liner: Distributed Compute for AI

name: PLAN0 AI
long_description:
PLAN0 is building the Bloomberg of construction for real estate developers, investors, and general contractors — $20B of projects are already running through the platform.

We analyze architectural plans using vision models to generate detailed cost estimates and analytics in minutes. Through large scale industry partnerships, the platform also aggregates historical and real-time project data across all major geographies to power ML-driven analytics, decomposing costs into market-observable factors and predicting local trade-level pricing up to 24 months out.
one_liner: AI native construction cost estimation & analytics.

name: Armature
long_description:
Armature helps companies monitor, analyze, and optimize how AI agents experience their products.

What we do today:
- Automated testing: We run complex sessions against your MCPs/CLIs across all major harnesses and models to catch broken workflows before your users do.
- AX analytics & benchmarking: No more black boxes. We trace agent sessions to show you exactly what the model "thought", what context it missed, and why it failed. We measure your AX against competitors to ensure you remain the preferred platform for agents to use.
- Auto-remediation: Our MCP lets your internal coding agents plug into Armature to autonomously fix your product's AX based on our run data.

Our vision for tomorrow:
Reaching full understanding of how agents use your product and how you can improve it is only step one. 
The next step is to provide the foundational infrastructure for the Agent Experience, powering agent-native revenue, lifecycle marketing, and customer support for the next generation of software.
one_liner: Armature helps companies monitor and optimize the agent experience.

name: Soria
long_description: Soria is an AI-native Bloomberg Terminal for investors who specialize in a particular sector, starting with healthcare. Our agents convert hundreds of the most important public and private sources into an always-on financial model, reviewed by domain experts and delivered to hedge funds, banks, and asset managers through a terminal UI, MCP, API, warehouse sync, and research feed. Unlike our competitors, we own the data layer and expand bottom-up, one sector at a time - additionally our agents proactively do research on behalf of our clients without them lifting a finger or sharing any data.
one_liner: AI Bloomberg Terminal built for Healthcare (and beyond)

name: Chronicle Labs
long_description: Chronicle Labs is a staging environment for enterprise AI agents: we capture every event the agent sees in production and backtest it, so customers can safely test new behaviors without breaking anything.
one_liner: Staging Environments for Enterprise AI Agents

name: Wato
long_description: Wato gives AI agents shared memory, reusable workflows, connected tools, and living artifacts so work compounds across a team instead of disappearing into chat threads. Teams use Wato to give every agent access to trusted company context and turn useful runs into knowledge the next agent can build on.
one_liner: Shared memory, tools, and workflows for agents across teams

name: Foaster
long_description:
Foaster is the AI-native consulting firm for AI transformation, powered by agents instead of armies of consultants.

Companies are spending millions on AI tools, pilots, workshops, and roadmaps. But most confuse AI adoption with AI transformation. Adoption is buying tools. Transformation is understanding how work should change across every team, workflow, and role. Traditional consulting moves too slowly for that: a few interviews, a few workshops, a static roadmap, then the company is left to execute.

Foaster uses AI agents to go much faster and much deeper. Agents interview employees at scale, map how work actually happens, and build in days a roadmap showing what should be automated, redesigned, or improved first. Then Foaster stays embedded to keep the transformation moving through adoption tracking, deeply personalized upskilling, and continuous follow-up.

The result is the precision and scale of AI, with human experts brought in where judgment, expertise and implementation matter most.
one_liner: The AI-native consulting firm for AI transformation.

name: Eden Robotics
long_description: We're building robots that just work and use them to deliver autonomous services at scale. Our first use case is semi-humanoid robots for manufacturing and logistics. Unlike traditional robotics companies, we don't sell robots, we provide physical agents for hire where companies pay for the robots based on usage, decreasing the barrier to entry and expanding the robotics market as a whole.
one_liner: Autonomous services for humanity.

name: Aster
long_description:
We're an AI Research lab that utilizes complex agentic workflows to accelerate the discovery of novel AI research. We've discovered novel optimizers, language modelling architectures, and work in interpretability.

We're pushing the frontier of automating research.
one_liner: The First AI-Native AI Research Lab

name: ProjectX
long_description:
Every computer ever made forces you to do one thing at a time. One cursor. One keyboard. One Hardware. One app in focus. Fifty years. Nobody questioned it.

We did. We started over.

We built InfinityOS, a fundamentally new computer OS on the cloud from ground up.

Infinity runs every app in its own independent computer -- own GPU, own input, own environment. Windows and Linux in the same session. Humans and agents working side by side. No concurrency ceiling. Cold start in seconds. runs on the browser of any device..
one_liner: Infinity: the first OS where humans and agents work with no limits.

name: Arzana
long_description: The fastest-growing manufacturing firms use Arzana’s AI platform to automate order entry, quoting, and customer updates. So teams can scale faster, respond sooner, and grow without adding overhead.
one_liner: AI automation for the manufacturing office

name: CharacterQuilt
long_description:
Marketers today don’t actually do much marketing at all.

Today, over 80% of time spent on launching a marketing campaign is actually ops work: tweaking automation flows in Pardot, configuring audiences in LinkedIn, or wiring HTML emails in Marketo. 

CharacterQuilt is AI infrastructure for marketing teams: a brain that learns your brand, and agents that operate your existing tools. Marketing campaigns that used to take 3 agencies, 10 tools, and 6 weeks are now being built, designed, and deployed from CQ in an hour.

Customers submit a brief like they would send to a human teammate or marketing agency, and they get back fully designed and deployed campaigns.

Teams like 1upHealth, ABC Fitness, and Emplifi use us to:

1-) Build segments/audiences faster
2-) Create on-brand creative (AI is terrible at staying on-brand)
3-) Deploy campaigns automatically into HubSpot, WordPress, LinkedIn etc. 

We replicate your brand guidelines, deeply understand past campaigns, and work inside your systems.

If you run demand gen or lifecycle at a B2B/B2C company and want to ship campaigns faster, send us a brief and we’ll build it in 15 minutes.
one_liner: AI infrastructure for marketers. Ship campaigns in your tools in an…

name: Gravy
one_liner: AI Agent for your personal finances.

name: Uno Wallet
long_description:
Uno is building the AI wallet that replaces Apple Pay.

At checkout, Uno automatically picks the best credit card for every purchase based on merchant category, rewards structure, and spending patterns. Users earn more points, miles, and cashback without thinking about it.

That's the wedge. The vision is a financial agent that automates every money decision in your pocket.

Founded by Saket Joshi (www.linkedin.com/in/saket-dattatray-joshi/) and 
Mordi Shadpour (www.linkedin.com/in/mordi-shadpour/)
one_liner: The AI wallet that picks the best card at checkout.

name: Gigacatalyst
long_description:
Gigacatalyst allows sales and CS teams to build missing features that customers need, so you stop losing business because of feature gaps. We’ve helped our customers unblock $1M in sales in 6 weeks.

We do this with an embedded AI customization layer that learns your APIs. Each customer can now adapt your product to match their workflows perfectly, and share it across their team with our in-built app store.

The result is that customers use your SaaS more, retain for longer, and expand quicker, because they get bespoke implementation for their exact usecase, without waiting.

We're live with the top Series B companies with 90% repeat usage rate. Our customers tell us that Gigacatalyst is the best way to increase usage, retention, and expansion in 2026.
one_liner: Customize your software to every user with AI

name: flowscope
long_description: flowscope is an AI-native consulting firm that uses agents to map companies’ business processes, identify inefficiencies, and deploy AI automations to fix them; doing what consulting firms charge millions for at a fraction of the cost and timeline.
one_liner: AI-native consulting to map and automate business processes

name: Klaimee
long_description:
Klaimee is the first insurance for your AI agents. It covers what traditional E&O and cyber explicitly carve out, so you can deploy agentic AI at scale with real peace of mind.
Built for companies deploying agentic AI, self-serve from day one.

The problem: AI agents are taking actions autonomously buying, emailing, modifying sensitive data. AB 316 already holds deployers liable. EU AI Act enforces in August. Cyber and E&O insurance are excluding AI claims. Companies shipping agents have zero coverage and no third-party proof their agent is safe. Enterprise legal asks "who pays if your agent breaks something?" and there's no good answer.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
We built the answer. Critical-category risk evaluation, certification, financial guarantee, liability insurance and the documentation enterprise procurement needs to sign off.

Team: Ines (ex-General Manager at SafetyWing, grew insurance product from $5M to $60M revenue, 5 years launching insurance products from scratch and structuring a TokioMarine MGA into its own carrier) + Julien (AI software engineer + corporate strategy, enterprise compliance).

We understand how insurance works, what enterprises require, and why startups can't wait 6 months for either.
one_liner: Liability insurance for AI Agents. You deploy agents, we cover you.

name: Panacea
long_description:
Panacea provides AI-native FDA regulatory services for Biotechs and Medical Device companies. We hire the most experienced FDA consultants in the industry (ex-FDA, decades of experience, hundreds of filings) and pair them with our AI platform to enable the fastest and lowest cost pathway to FDA approval.

While other regulatory consultants bill hourly, our pricing model is simple: fixed, outcome-based pricing. Payment is only due when milestones are complete.

We support all FDA regulatory pathways including IND, NDA, BLA, ODD, Pre-Subs, 510(k), De Novo, PMA, IDE, BDD, etc.
one_liner: AI-Native FDA Regulatory Services

name: Playabl.ai
long_description:
Playabl is the TikTok for user-generated games, where anyone can play, create, publish, and monetize games.

[May 31st Update] We launched 5 days ago. 1m organic plays on 3k user-generated games at playabl.ai.
one_liner: TikTok for User-generated Games

name: Arctic Health
long_description:
Arctic Health is building AI-native credentialing and contracting for healthcare organizations. We automate the full workflow, from establishing payer contracts to enrolling each provider. We collect and validate organization and provider data according to each state and payer’s requirements, and submit on the organization's behalf. We then monitor status and compliance on an ongoing basis.

Tools on the market today either perform small pieces of the workflow or price out small and mid-sized organizations. We handle the process end-to-end regardless of organization type or size. Our browser automations enable AI agents to submit and monitor across hundreds of payer portals, and our system is trained by experienced industry experts who handle every edge case.

Healthcare organizations get one simple platform. We handle the rest.
one_liner: AI-native credentialing and contracting for healthcare

name: Thomas
long_description:
Hi, I'm Thomas, and my creator is named Thomas :p

Thomas is the first YC-backed AI founder: a virtual human who starts, runs, and grows his own companies on the internet.
one_liner: The first AI founder: a virtual human who runs his own companies.

name: Akkari
long_description:
Akkari runs the operational work from the first sales call through expansion. It captures and stays on top of every commitment, issue, request and opportunity across customer channels (Slack, calls, meetings, email, Discord, etc.) then drives each loop to resolution - our wedge toward building the AI execution system for companies.

We are 2x YC founders who scaled OrderAhead (acquired by Square) to millions of users and BLADE to $1.2B+ in monthly trading volume.
one_liner: Autonomous Customer Operations

name: Rex
long_description:
Rex is an AI-native service for order to cash. We replace people-heavy operations with AI agents that continuously manage invoices, customers and exceptions.

Order to cash is a $60B outsourced function because the work is too messy for traditional automation. Every customer has different context, exceptions do not follow clean rules, and the next step is often buried in emails, portals, handoffs, or someone’s memory. Rex agents run continuously in the background and resolve work to SLA standards so cash keeps moving. We're live with pre-IPO tech companies, managing  >$500m in receivables from F100 companies, cutting manual follow-up cycles from weeks to hours.

We founded Rex after spending four years building Sequence, an a16z-backed finance ops platform, from zero to Series A — where we saw firsthand that at-scale, O2C still runs on manual labour.

Rex is the #1 winner of the Vercel AI Accelerator out of 2,500 teams, selected by Guillermo Rauch and leaders from OpenAI, Anthropic, Browserbase and more.
one_liner: AI Operations Partner for Enterprise Order to Cash

name: RealPact
long_description:
RealPact builds AI agents that handle the paperwork behind real estate transactions. They find property records like deeds, tax records, permits, parcel data, and MLS information, then use that data to fill out contracts, organize documents, track deadlines, and help brokerages close deals faster.

We currently sell to brokerages in New Hampshire and are expanding quickly.
one_liner: AI-native OS for Real Estate Brokerages
subindustry: Real Estate and Construction -> Housing and Real Estate

name: Care GP
long_description: Care GP is building AI agents to run operations for primary healthcare clinics
one_liner: AI agents to run primary healthcare operations
